diceDesc.cinder: In Weapons, a max roll sets Burn 1 on the target.
diceDesc.gyro: Once per battle, flip to the opposite face.
diceDesc.coil: If it rolls the same value as last turn, +1.
diceDesc.sprout: On a max roll, grows +1 for the run (up to +2).
diceDesc.ashen: On a min roll, the next black die this turn gets +2.
diceDesc.copycat: Once per battle, copy an adjacent die's value.
diceDesc.coreshard: Prismatic wildcard for sets and affinities.

resonance.red-4: A max-face weapon roll applies Burn 2.
resonance.red-6: The first Weapons slot resolves twice.
resonance.blue-2: +1 to every blue die's minimum roll.
resonance.blue-6: Once per turn, a blue die can't roll below average.
resonance.green-2: A die repeating last turn's value gets +2.
resonance.green-4: End of battle: heal 1 per green die.
resonance.green-6: A green die on max grows +1 for the run (up to +3).
resonance.black-2: Black dice may exceed a slot cap (−1 hull).
resonance.black-4: A min-face black roll maxes the next black die.
resonance.black-6: Once per battle, survive a lethal hit at 1 hull.
resonance.grey-4: Grey dice may copy an adjacent value.

perksDesc.hot-charge: A max-face weapon roll deals +2 damage.
perksDesc.ricochet: Weapon A overkill carries to the next enemy.
perksDesc.double-fuse: The first Burn each battle is doubled.
perksDesc.ice-circuit: A shields die at 6+ grants +2 shield.
perksDesc.reflector: A dodge deals 3 damage back to the attacker.
perksDesc.blue-reserve: One extra reserve slot, blue dice only.
perksDesc.stabilizer: The first blue die each turn can't roll 1.
perksDesc.echo: A die repeating last turn's value grants +1 charge.
perksDesc.blood-reactor: Once per turn, pay 2 hull for +3 charge.
perksDesc.sacrifice: Burn a die to pool +4 weapon damage this turn.
perksDesc.back-door: A min-face black roll grants +6 scrap.
perksDesc.spare: Turn start: the lowest die gets +1.
